description: USCIS slogan graphic on a soft light-blue background with a faint, large ghosted Department of Homeland Security / USCIS seal watermark. Bold dark-navy serif text in the upper left reads 'Green cards and visas are a privilege, not a right.' with the word 'privilege' in italics and underlined with a hand-drawn red swoosh. The lower portion shows two overlapping sample identity documents: a specimen U.S. 'PERMANENT RESIDENT' green card (sample name 'TEST V SPECIMEN', category IR1, country of birth Bahamas) with a Statue of Liberty and flag motif, and a sample U.S. 'IMMIGRANT VISA' page (issuing post U.S. Consulate General London, sample name 'HAPPYPERSON TRAVELER') including the machine-readable code at the bottom.
notable_text: Green cards and visas are a privilege, not a right.
